description: A task brief is the entry point for one workflow iteration. Fill it in before running `plan`.

fields.title: Short label for this task (used in history index)
fields.goal: What must be true when this task is complete? Be precise.
fields.context: What is the relevant current state of the repo / dataset / experiment?
fields.constraints: Hard constraints that cannot be violated (protocol refs, scope limits, naming rules, etc.)
fields.inputs: Files, artifacts, or data that the executor will need (with paths)
fields.outputs: Files or artifacts that must exist when the task is done (with paths)
fields.execution_model_preference: Optional: which model key to target (sonnet/opus/gpt54/codex)
fields.related_phases: Which workflow phases does this task span? (e.g. planning + execution)

blank_template:
# Task Brief

## Title
<!-- Short label for history index -->

## Goal
<!-- What must be true when this task is done? Be specific and testable. -->

## Context
<!-- Current repo / dataset / experiment state relevant to this task -->

## Constraints
<!-- Hard constraints: protocol refs, scope limits, naming conventions, do-nots -->

## Inputs
<!-- Files or artifacts the executor needs. Include paths relative to repo root. -->

## Outputs
<!-- Files or artifacts that must exist when done. Include paths. -->

## Execution model preference
<!-- Optional: sonnet / opus / gpt54 / codex -->

## Notes
<!-- Anything else a fresh reader needs to understand this task -->
